message:
Section 32: Security Vulnerability Assessment Patterns

CASS Mining: Security audit patterns from real-world vulnerability assessments
- Security audit methodology framework with attack surface mapping
- OWASP-aligned vulnerability categories (A01-A05 covered)
- Cryptographic security (AES-GCM, Argon2id, nonce handling, key derivation)
- Input validation patterns (path traversal, XSS, SQL injection, command injection)
- Authentication security (JWT management, OAuth, PKCE, session handling)
- Rate limiting and DoS protection (IP extraction, ReDoS mitigation)
- Secret management (environment variables, API key best practices)
- Command execution security (whitelist, heredoc analysis)
- Security audit report template

Plan version: 1.8.0 (~15,200 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
